may 23 3rd odi st kitts 13:30 gmt
may 23,2006 3rd odi st kitts 13:30 gmt
west indies 248 for 6 (sarwan 115*, chanderpaul 58, agarkar
2-32) beat india 245 for 9 (sehwag 96, kaif 63, bradshaw 2-
41) by four wickets
first lord is in the 10 th house along with the 2nd and 11 th
lord.
the seventh lord is in the 12 th house.
seventh lord is the india which batted second and first lord
